data.body: MILESTONE: change 558 (ddbe PS3) AND 560 (4e9d PS1) BOTH fully green (LLM-Review+1 AND Verified+1). 4e9d ticket CLOSED (completion-verifier passed). ddbe+4e9d both DONE. bde5 plan PASS+signed in 2 rounds (pre-grounding worked). Claiming bde5. Advisories to fold: verify_authorship must catch show_ticket raising (never raise); test must verify AUTO-registration at import (not explicit call).
